project.title: Crie veinte anos a esa nina. Su madre volvio - Parte 3
project.subtitle: Las tres veces
project.hook: Ese hombre quiere caminar al altar con mi hija. Y no es nada de ella.

joven_puerta.prompt: Same character Jeong-hui but twenty years younger, age 34, the same face without the deep lines, black hair tied back, a plain dark apron over a jumper, standing upright with one hand flat on a closed door and the other holding a small child's hand out of frame, frightened resolute expression, neutral studio background.

de_pie_dolida.prompt: Same character Da-yeong, same face with the small mole under one eye, long dark brown hair loose, the pale wool coat hanging open over a plain blouse, standing upright with both arms rigid at her sides, both hands closed into fists, wounded furious expression, neutral studio background.

joven_lluvia.prompt: Same character Ji-ah but twenty years younger, age 27, the same narrow face and the same small mole under one eye, wet hair stuck to her forehead, a thin soaked jacket, standing upright with both fists raised as if knocking, desperate expression, neutral studio background.

callejon_lluvia.display_name: Callejon bajo la lluvia (hace veinte anos)

base.prompt: EMPTY narrow Korean market alley twenty years ago in heavy night rain seen from one end, older wooden shutters, a single bare bulb over one closed shop door, water running along the gutter, cold blue rain light with one weak warm bulb, no people, no text, realistic cinematic K-drama, vertical 9:16.

puerta_cerrada.prompt: Same rainy alley, new camera position directly at the closed shop door under the bare bulb, the wet wooden door filling most of the frame, rain streaking the frosted glass panel, cold blue light with the weak bulb above, empty set, no people, no text.

desde_adentro.prompt: Same shop door seen from inside the dark shop, the frosted glass panel of the closed door filling the frame with rain streaking the far side and a blurred shape of the alley bulb beyond, the interior unlit and dark, empty set, no people, no text.

base.prompt: EMPTY small neighbourhood coffee shop seen from the door, four round tables with mismatched chairs, a counter with a coffee machine, a wide window onto the wet street, warm afternoon light through the glass, no people, no text, realistic cinematic K-drama, vertical 9:16.

lado_a.prompt: Same coffee shop, new camera position at table level from one side of a round table by the window, the tabletop with two cups in the foreground, the chair opposite facing camera, the wet street beyond the glass, same warm light, empty set, no people, no text.

lado_b.prompt: Same coffee shop, new camera position at table level from the opposite side of the same round table, the tabletop and cups in the foreground, the counter and coffee machine behind the facing chair, same warm light, empty set, no people, no text.

ingredients.generation_prompt: Single small worn notebook lying open, cream ruled pages with twenty short handwritten ink lines listed one under another, the paper soft and thumbed at the corner, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single small faded colour photograph of a five-year-old East-Asian girl standing alone in front of a shop shutter, the corners bent and one edge torn, lying on a worn wooden table, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no text, no logo.

Three old unopened letters bound together with a rubber band, the cheap envelopes yellowed and water-stained, one corner stamped with a returned-to-sender mark, no readable text, lying on a worn wooden table, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single finished simple white wedding dress hanging on a wooden hanger inside a clear plastic garment cover, the hem neatly sewn, hooked on a metal rail, warm lamp light behind it, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no text, no logo.

tts_export.note: Una sola voz femenina narra todas las escenas, incluidos los dialogos. Fish Audio por escena.
